basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Private Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Gauhati High Court has released the official Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Recruitment 2026 Notification on its official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Bachelor's degree, Diploma in Stenography, shorthand speed of 120 wpm, and computer typing speed of 50 wpm can apply online before 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max Age limit: OBC/MOBC: 41, ST(P)/ST(H): 43, PwBD: 48
age_limit.details: Maximum Age limit for OBC/MOBC: 41 years Maximum Age limit for ST(P)/ST(H): 43 years Maximum Age limit for PwBD: 48 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree, Diploma in Stenography, 120 wpm shorthand, 50 wpm computer typing
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree from a recognized University. Diploma in Stenography in English. Minimum speed of 120 wpm in shorthand. Minimum speed of 50 wpm on a computer. Valid Employment Exchange Registration Number for the state of Assam. Law graduates will be given due weightage.

salary_details.details: Pay band PB-4 Scale Rs.30000-110000/- Grade Pay Rs. 13300/- Allowances as admissible under rules.

selection_process: Stenography test: 90 marks Written examination (Descriptive Type): 100 marks: 2 hours duration Interview/Viva-Voce: 30 marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Gauhati High Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree from a recognized University. Diploma in Stenography in English. Minimum speed of 120 wpm in shorthand. Minimum speed of 50 wpm on a computer. Valid Employment Exchange Registration Number for the state of Assam. Law graduates will be given due weightage.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age limit for OBC/MOBC: 41 years Maximum Age limit for ST(P)/ST(H): 43 years Maximum Age limit for PwBD: 48 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay band PB-4 Scale Rs.30000-110000/- Grade Pay Rs. 13300/- Allowances as admissible under rules.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Stenography test: 90 marks Written examination (Descriptive Type): 100 marks: 2 hours duration Interview/Viva-Voce: 30 marks

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gauhati High Court Private Secretary post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 30 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree from a recognized University and a Diploma in Stenography in English with specific shorthand and computer typing speeds.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies for different categories. For OBC/MOBC it is 41 years, for ST(P)/ST(H) it is 43 years, and for PwBD it is 48 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the post of Private Secretary (Stenographer Grade-I) in the Gauhati High Court.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed in Pay Band PB-4, with a scale of Rs.30000-110000/- and a Grade Pay of Rs. 13300/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs.500/- for OBC/MOBC, Rs. 250/- for ST(P)/ST(H), and Nil for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Stenography test, a Written examination (Descriptive Type), and an Interview/Viva-Voce.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for OBC/MOBC, ST(P)/ST(H), and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Gauhati High Court Private Secretary post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of the Gauhati High Court before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information and to apply is https://ghconline.gov.in.
